facebook.caption: Tourists scroll past this one. Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc sits on Hẻm 126A Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, away from the resort-row chaos. Bungalows right on the beach. A casual eatery steps from the water. Motorcycle rentals on-site so you move on your own schedule. 488 reviews, 4.0 stars. Not flashy. Just real. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bungalows, beachside food, and a motorbike waiting at the door. Free Beach Resort Phu Quoc is the low-key base tourists keep skipping. 488 reviews say otherwise. Tag your travel buddy.
